_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide recommendations on data structures and databases that ensure correct and quality production of reports/management information.
reference_document_element_description: Produce regular data quality reports for governance and business stakeholders, including trend analysis, high-impact issue summaries, and remediation progress.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.569), DQ-T-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.559).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.588). Shared vocabulary: [data, quality, reports]. DCWF-only terms [correct, databases, ensure, information, management, production] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, business, governance, high, impact, issue] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.878, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Provide recommendations on data structures and databases that ensure correct and" and "Produce regular data quality reports for governance and business stakeholders, i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.580 ≈ STS 0.588 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, quality, reports] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [data, quality, reports]. DCWF-only: [correct, databases, ensure, information, management, production]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, business, governance, high, impact, issue].
